requirement_topic.en: Transport — UN 38.3 and Angola route logistics
requirement_topic.zh: 运输——UN 38.3 与安哥拉运输线路要求
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸——UN 38.3 與安哥拉運輸路線要求

summary.en: Lithium batteries and power banks exported to Angola require safe dangerous-goods handling based on UN 38.3 for most logistics chains, including air and ocean shipment preparation. For sea and inland distribution inside Angola, commercial documentation, route labels, and receiving-party declarations at points like Luanda and Lobito must align with cargo-operator requirements and local inspection expectations.
summary.zh: 出口到安哥拉的锂电池与移动电源通常需要按 UN 38.3 要求进行危险品准备，包括空运和海运前置条件。进入海运和安哥拉内陆分运阶段时，运单、标签及收货声明通常需与承运人及当地检验流程匹配，罗安达（Luanda）和洛比托（Lobito）是常见入境节点。
summary.zht: 出口到安哥拉的鋰電池與行動電源通常需要按 UN 38.3 要求進行危險品準備，包括空運和海運前置條件。進入海運和安哥拉內陸分運階段時，運單、標籤及收貨聲明通常需與承運人及當地檢驗流程匹配，羅安達（Luanda）與洛比托（Lobito）是常見入境節點。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3
IATA DGR (air transport requirements for lithium cells and batteries)
IMDG Code (sea transport hazardous goods framework)

summary.en: China’s air and export logistics already rely heavily on UN 38.3 evidence for battery shipments and carrier compliance checks. China-side procedures are generally well aligned at the testing-report level, but Angola routing adds local-port and operator workflow requirements at destination that need separate controls.
summary.zh: 中国的空运和外贸物流通常已按电池出货要求使用 UN 38.3 证据并进行承运商检查，测试报告层面与全球要求通常比较一致。实际差异在于安哥拉目的地航线和港口运营流程，需要补充目的地文件和对接。
summary.zht: 中國的空運和外貿物流通常已按電池出貨要求使用 UN 38.3 證據並進行承運商檢查，測試報告層面與全球要求通常比較一致。實際差異在於安哥拉目的地航線和港口運營流程，需要補充目的地文件和對接。

standards_or_laws: GB 12268 and domestic dangerous goods road transport references
Local air and sea forwarding operational requirements used by exporters

gap.en: Global test evidence is usually reusable, so the gap is mostly destination logistics and paperwork execution: accepted UN 38.3 status must be accompanied by Angola-route commercial and customs handling controls at Luanda and Lobito, plus clear consignee/importer documentation.
gap.zh: UN 38.3 等全球层面的测试证据通常可复用，差距主要在目的地物流和文书执行：在安哥拉入口（如罗安达、洛比托）应补充符合当地流程的收货人、进口商、货代和海关文件衔接。
gap.zht: UN 38.3 等全球層面的測試證據通常可復用，差距主要在目的地物流和文書執行：在安哥拉入口（如羅安達、洛比托）應補充符合當地流程的收貨人、進口商、貨代和海關文件銜接。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for physical export and carriage: UN 38.3 evidence plus route-consistent logistics and customs documents is required for Angola shipment acceptance.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese logistics and export operations where dangerous goods movement applies

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport requirements are largely harmonised at the safety-test level, but Angola market entry depends on destination compliance execution. Verify consignee role, destination docs, and port handling steps at Luanda and Lobito before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输层面的安全测试要求在全球范围相对统一，但安哥拉入场最终取决于目的地执行层面。出货前请确认收货方职责、目的地文件与罗安达/洛比托港处理流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸層面的安全測試要求在全球範圍相對統一，但安哥拉入場最終取決於目的地執行層面。出貨前請確認收貨方責任、目的地文件與羅安達/洛比托港處理流程。
